entity.summary: Findora decentralized exchange providing V2-style automated-market-maker token swaps and liquidity pools with historical exchange-volume activity and residual protocol liquidity.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies FairySwap V1 as the first V2-style DEX on Findora and reports current TVL plus historical cumulative DEX volume, but current 24-hour DEX volume is zero and the first-party website could not be fully fetched in this review pass. HEI therefore uses limited and live_unverified rather than active.

evidence.title: FairySwap official website
evidence.notes: Dedicated first-party FairySwap domain is preserved, but the site could not be fully fetched during this review pass, so URL status remains live_unverified.

evidence.title: FairySwap V1 metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies FairySwap V1 as a Findora DEX and reports current TVL and cumulative DEX volume.

evidence.title: FairySwap DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies FairySwap V1 on Findora; limited status reflects zero recent volume and incomplete first-party availability verification.
